purpose: Contract backfill reconciliation: ownership waterfall, residual acreage bridge, and water realization bounds for universal valuation proofs.

primary_sources.role: FY2025 audited income-tax-basis financial statements and notes

resolved_facts: AZLCZ values one common share of Aztec Land and Cattle Company, Limited only (141,666 shares at 2025-12-31). Stapled Aztec Land Company LLC units are excluded from the economic claim until legal look-through is documented.
FY2024 excess revenues over expenses were $2,134,121; FY2025 rentals were $3,459,613 with $2,343,008 excess cash-basis revenue over expenses after one-time land sales and Dry Lake cattle charges.
Renewable ground leases are lessor contracts: lessee capital sits off AZLCZ balance sheet; development and construction terms remain cancellable without refund (Note 10).

Collective surface acreage is approximately 239,000 acres; Hashknife solar panel footprint (~4,200 acres per approved Groundbreaker cross-check) is excluded from residual land NAV and lease cash is capitalized separately.
South Well Field entitlement is 13,490 acre-feet per year (Note 17); North Well Field delivered ~95 AF in 2025. Little Colorado adjudication remains open (Note 13).

ownership_waterfall.gross_to_net: Project economics flow to AZLCZ as ground rent and disclosed investments; no AZLCZ equity funding of hyperscaler capex is modeled.
ownership_waterfall.related_party: Notes receivable $5,019,360 and Apache Railway investment $3,592,687 are filed balances; railway_and_notes applies strategic marks and collectability haircuts.
ownership_waterfall.tax_and_reserve: realization_reserve captures incremental tax, OTC illiquidity, and minority-control friction beyond filing liabilities.

water_realization.proof_approach: risk_adjusted_milestone_value with explicit realization_probability; full entitlement not marked in base case.

conclusion: Deterministic calculation proofs anchor each additive component to filing facts plus bounded judgments. Curated follow-up gaps are closed for contract readiness; stapled LLC look-through and parcel-level maps remain human-review items.
